Urgent: confirm your Office 365 account before tomorrow

From: Microsoft 365 Security <security@micr0soft.example>
To: you@contoso.com
Sent: today, 8:17 AM

Hi,

A sign-in from an unrecognised device was detected on your account. Please verify your account here within 24 hours to avoid suspension.

You can also reach the password recovery portal if you've forgotten your credentials.

For more on phishing, see Microsoft's official page at Microsoft Learn and the Wikipedia overview.

You can also check our internal status page or this update notice.

Best,
The Microsoft 365 Security Team

Aegis fixture · expected verdicts: micr0soft.net phishing · example.com/r?u=... suspicious · learn.microsoft.com safe · en.wikipedia.org safe · 10.0.0.42 phishing · invoice.zip suspicious.
